task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for 4-Bedroom House in Los Angeles CA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2100000.00 and wholesale is $1680000.00. Product features: Modern home with pool and outdoor entertainment area in Sherman Oaks. Reference: https://www.realtor.com/realestateandhomes-detail/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for 4-Bedroom House in Los Angeles CA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying 4-Bedroom House in Los Angeles CA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
